supportResident.title: How can we help you?
supportResident.faqDescription: Didn't find what you need? Submit a ticket and we'll reply there.
supportResident.chatGreeting: Hello! How can we help you today?
supportResident.faq1Answer: A platform to run condominiums and residential buildings—common areas, collections, maintenance, and resident communications—with the same experience on this site and in the web app.
supportResident.faq2Question: How do I pick a subscription plan?
supportResident.faq2Answer: Choose based on how many apartments your building has. Amounts are in Peruvian soles (PEN) and billing is monthly. If you're unsure at a range boundary, contact us via Support.
supportResident.faq3Question: How do I contact the team?
supportResident.faq3Answer: Email hola@ejemplo.com or open a ticket from Support in your profile once you have access to the application.
supportResident.faq4Answer: We follow solid security practices and clear terms. Legal details are in the terms of service linked in the footer.
